songs.name: Nhemamusasa Yepasi / Yekutanga
songs.notes: Forward Kwenda's preferred name. More ancient version. Progression 5 is rarer.

songs.name: Tadzungaira
songs.notes: 6 beats per chord instead of standard 4. Prayer to end all human suffering.

songs.name: Tadzungaira
songs.notes: Same song, different tuning family = different progression. Root feel shifts to note 6.

songs.name: Bangidza
songs.notes: Multiple tuning versions. Rich tutorial coverage. Ideal for pattern logic training.
sources: mbira.online (Muda Magaya, Tute Chigamba, Leonard Chiyanike, Samson Bvure)
